name: Instant Cream of Whatever Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the powdered milk and cornstarch until well combined.
2. Gradually add the chicken bouillon granules, stirring continuously to avoid lumps.
3. Stir in the onion powder, thyme, basil, and pepper.
4. Gradually mix in the remaining 2 cups of powdered milk until smooth.
5. Heat the mixture over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until it thickens and reaches your desired consistency.
6. Turn off the heat once the soup has reached your preferred thickness.
